name: China Changjiang Mining & New Energy Company, Ltd.
summary: China Changjiang Mining & New Energy Company, Ltd., a development stage company, engages in real estate leasing business in the People's Republic of China. It develops and operates engineering, procurement, and construction projects comprising the Weinan Hechuan 137KWp solar PV building applications. The company also holds land use rights in a land parcel; and leases a portion of the land use rights on the 5.7 square kilometer parcel for the development and operation of a theme park. China Changjiang Mining & New Energy Company, Ltd. is headquartered in Xi'an, the People's Republic of China.
